targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "team_scoreboard")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => exists r.team_id and r.team_id =~ /^${team_id:regex}$/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rank" or r._field == "score" or r._field == "threads" or r._field == "fork_exec" or r._field == "other" or r._field == "avg_5d" or r._field == "up_count" or r._field == "tw" or r._field == "perf" or r._field == "build_ok" or r._field == "boot_ok")
  |> group(columns: ["team_id", "display_name", "visibility_mode", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["team_id", "display_name", "visibility_mode"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> keep(columns: ["team_id", "display_name", "visibility_mode", "rank", "score", "threads", "fork_exec", "other", "avg_5d", "up_count", "tw", "perf", "build_ok", "boot_ok"])
  |> sort(columns: ["rank"])

panels.title: Latest Standings For Selected Stable Teams

list.definition:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "${bucket}", tag: "team_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "team_scoreboard", start: -30d)
list.label: Stable Team
list.name: team_id
list.query:
import "influxdata/influxdb/schema"
schema.tagValues(bucket: "${bucket}", tag: "team_id", predicate: (r) => r._measurement == "team_scoreboard", start: -30d)
